{{Quote|Volcano crater flight, eh? Lava shooting up all around us. Intense heat. High risk factor. That will be no problem at all.|Master Pilot Menddle|<ref name="SWG:ToOW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]''</ref>}}
'''Menddle''' was a [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], he was the only pilot at the [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]] willing to fly a group of [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] into a [[Volcano/Legends|volcano]] to battle the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[HK-47]].

{{Char-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Menddle appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], 2011.
